description: lq-maintainer-agent §2.1 safety floor — PreToolUse hook registration for the plugin path. Auto-discovered at the plugin root (hooks/hooks.json); the hook body lives at settings/hooks/block-writes.sh. This file carries ONLY the hooks block (no permissions key — plugins cannot inject permission rules); keep it in sync with the hooks block in settings/claude-settings.json, the settings-file path for lq-ai's M0 copy. Changes here are §3.6 permission-bearing: two maintainer reviews, CODEOWNERS-routed.
